claims.summary: The 48D codec and dimensions 40-43 should carry a coherent trajectory rather than only pointwise statistics.
claims.disposition: verify current source and narrative-arc regressions preserve direction, curvature, velocity, acceleration, and intertextual persistence

claims.summary: Highly repetitive low-variance text should not acquire ghost entropy from usize-to-f32 statistical conversion.
claims.disposition: verify current bounded-window and entropy fixtures distinguish repeated input from diverse input without a false nonzero texture claim

claims.summary: High entropy should not flatten or overwrite the narrative-arc lane.
claims.disposition: verify the high-entropy vibrancy tests leave narrative dimensions untouched and the headroom review names quiet or pressured arc evidence separately

claims.summary: Pressure, mode packing, and density should remain visible beside semantic gain rather than being collapsed into loudness.
claims.disposition: verify current codec delivery and vibrancy evidence report pressure, density, gradient, lane RMS, and headroom without changing gain

claims.summary: Adding a pressure-dampening coefficient to codec gain would change live semantic projection.
claims.disposition: require separate Mike/operator Tier 5 approval with replay, bounds, canary, abort, and felt-response evidence before pressure-coupled gain

claims.summary: Distinguishability loss and felt micro-breathing are not interchangeable scalar claims.
claims.disposition: preserve the felt concern while verifying current source reports distinguishability, narrative motion, and delivery headroom as separate evidence
